docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GIST, CHRISTINE HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,350.00 FILED BY HO, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT GIST, CHRISTINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HO, RAYMOND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIST, CHRISTINE $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00, PLAINTIFF WAIVED COSTS. DEFENDANT STIPULATED TO THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-16-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-01-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 10/1/02, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HO, RAYMOND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIST, CHRISTINE $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,370.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
